title: Over Bleeding During Periods: 8 Herbal Creams for Teen Girls to Try

remedies.remedy_desc: Vitex agnus-castus creams are a natural remedy that may help with over bleeding during periods. These creams contain the herb Vitex agnus-castus, also known as chaste tree, which has been used for centuries to balance hormones and regulate menstrual cycles. The active compounds in Vitex agnus-castus, such as iridoid glycosides and flavonoids, have anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, which may help to reduce heavy bleeding by relaxing the uterine muscles and improving blood clotting. To use Vitex agnus-castus creams for over bleeding during periods, apply a small amount to the affected area, such as the lower abdomen, 2-3 times a day. It's essential to start using the cream 1-2 weeks before your period is expected to begin and continue using it throughout your period. You can also take it orally in the form of capsules or tinctures, but topical application is often more effective. As you use Vitex agnus-castus creams, you may experience a decrease in heavy bleeding, reduced menstrual cramps, and improved overall menstrual health. Some women may also notice a shorter duration of their periods and a reduction in the number of pads or tampons used. However, it's essential to note that individual results may vary, and it's recommended to consult with a healthcare provider before using Vitex agnus-castus creams, especially if you have underlying medical conditions or are taking medications.
remedies.image_alt: Vitex agnus-castus herbal creams for over bleeding during periods

remedies.remedy_desc: Angelica sinensis creams are topical products that can help with over bleeding during periods. The Angelica sinensis plant, also known as Dong Quai, contains properties and constituents like ferulic acid, baicalein, and ligustilide, which have antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects. These properties help to reduce blood vessel constriction, alleviate cramping, and calm the uterus, thereby decreasing heavy bleeding.  When experiencing over bleeding, apply a small amount of Angelica sinensis cream to the lower abdomen, just above the pubic bone. Gently massage the cream into the skin in a circular motion. You can also soak a cold compress in water, add a few drops of the cream, and place it on your lower abdomen for 10-15 minutes, 2-3 times a day.  As you apply the cream, you may experience a decrease in bleeding within a few hours. The cream may also help to reduce cramping, making it easier to move around and perform daily activities. In some cases, the bleeding may still occur, but the amount may decrease, and the flow may become more manageable. If the bleeding persists or worsens, it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional for further guidance and support.
remedies.image_alt: Angelica sinensis herbal creams for over bleeding during periods

remedies.remedy_desc: Cimicifuga racemosa creams are herbal remedies that may help with over bleeding during periods. These creams contain a key compound called actein, which has been shown to have a uterine-contracting effect, helping to reduce blood flow and slow down heavy bleeding. Cimicifuga racemosa also contains other constituents like ferulic acid and rosmarinic acid, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe and calm the uterine lining, reducing inflammation and promoting healing. If you experience over bleeding during periods and are considering using Cimicifuga racemosa creams, here's what you can do: first, consult with a healthcare provider to rule out any underlying medical conditions that may be causing the heavy bleeding. If your doctor gives you the green light, start by using a small amount of the cream, applying it to the lower abdomen and following the instructions provided. Begin with a low dose and gradually increase as needed. It's also essential to note that Cimicifuga racemosa creams are not a substitute for medical treatment, so be sure to keep an eye on your bleeding and seek medical attention if it worsens or persists. When using Cimicifuga racemosa creams, you can expect the following outcomes: some users may experience a reduction in heavy bleeding within a few days to a week, while others may take longer to notice any effects. You may also experience some relief from cramping and discomfort, as the anti-inflammatory properties of the cream help to soothe the uterine lining. However, it's essential to remember that everyone's body is different, and results may vary. As with any new remedy, be patient and monitor your body's response, and adjust your usage accordingly.
remedies.image_alt: Cimicifuga racemosa herbal creams for over bleeding during periods

remedies.remedy_desc: Glycyrrhiza glabra creams are often used to help with over bleeding during periods. This is because they contain compounds like glycyrrhizin, which has anti-inflammatory properties. Glycyrrhizin helps to reduce inflammation in the uterus, which can cause heavy bleeding. The cream also contains flavonoids and triterpenoids, which have a soothing effect on the uterine lining and can help to stop bleeding. If you're experiencing heavy bleeding, take the following steps: Apply a small amount of Glycyrrhiza glabra cream to your lower abdomen, just above the pubic bone, 2-3 times a day. You can also try soaking a tampon or sanitary pad in the cream and inserting it vaginally. This will help the active ingredients to reach the affected area directly. It's essential to note that you should consult your doctor before using any new remedies, especially if you have any underlying medical conditions. Using Glycyrrhiza glabra creams for over bleeding may lead to a reduction in bleeding, which can provide relief from discomfort and anxiety. Some users may also experience a decrease in menstrual cramps due to the anti-inflammatory properties of glycyrrhizin. However, it's crucial to remember that if your bleeding is heavy, it's a sign of a possible underlying issue, and you should consult your doctor to rule out any other health problems.
remedies.image_alt: Glycyrrhiza glabra herbal creams for over bleeding during periods

remedies.remedy_desc: Trifolium pratense creams, also known as red clover creams, are used to help with heavy bleeding during periods. This is because they contain isoflavones, specifically genistein and daidzein, which have hormone-balancing properties. These isoflavones can help regulate the body's estrogen levels, which can contribute to heavy bleeding. Additionally, the creams contain other compounds like coumarins and triterpenes, which have anti-inflammatory and soothing effects, reducing menstrual cramps and discomfort. If you're experiencing heavy bleeding, try applying a small amount of Trifolium pratense cream to your lower abdomen about 2-3 times a day. You can also use it as a warm compress by applying the cream to a cloth and heating it in the microwave for a few seconds before applying it to your abdomen. It's essential to note that you should consult with your healthcare provider before using any new creams, especially if you have a history of heavy bleeding or other health conditions. Using Trifolium pratense cream may help reduce heavy bleeding, alleviate menstrual cramps, and promote overall comfort during your period. You may also notice a decrease in bleeding after a few days of using the cream. However, it's crucial to remember that everyone's body is different, and it may take some time to see noticeable results. It's also essential to monitor your bleeding and report any changes to your healthcare provider.
remedies.image_alt: Trifolium pratense herbal creams for over bleeding during periods

remedies.remedy_desc: Hypericum perforatum creams, also known as St. John's Wort creams, contain the plant's active compounds, such as hyperforin, hypericin, and flavonoids. These properties help to reduce inflammation, ease pain, and promote healing in the uterine lining, which can become thin and irritated during heavy periods. When applied topically as a cream, these compounds can be absorbed through the skin and into the bloodstream, reducing the severity of bleeding and menstrual cramps.  To use Hypericum perforatum creams for over bleeding during periods, apply a small amount to the affected area, such as the lower abdomen, and gently massage it in until absorbed. Repeat as needed, ideally 2-3 times a day. It's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any new product, especially if you're already taking medication or have underlying medical conditions. Using Hypericum perforatum creams may help to reduce bleeding and cramping, making it easier to manage heavy periods. You may notice a decrease in the frequency and duration of bleeding, as well as a reduction in menstrual cramp intensity. However, if your bleeding is severe or persists, it's crucial to speak with your doctor to rule out any underlying conditions that require medical attention.
remedies.image_alt: Hypericum perforatum herbal creams for over bleeding during periods

remedies.remedy_desc: Althaea officinalis creams are a natural remedy that can help with over bleeding during periods. This is because the cream contains marshmallow root, which has anti-inflammatory and astringent properties. The root is rich in mucilage, a thick, protective substance that can help to soothe and calm the uterus, reducing inflammation and heavy bleeding. The cream also contains other constituents like flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects.  If you're experiencing over bleeding during your period, you can try using Althaea officinalis cream as a topical application. To do this, apply a small amount of the cream to your lower abdomen, 1-2 times a day. You can also take a warm bath with a few drops of the cream added to the water for added relief. It's essential to note that if you're experiencing heavy bleeding, you should speak with your healthcare provider before using any new remedies.  As you use the Althaea officinalis cream, you may notice a reduction in bleeding, and your period may become more manageable. The cream can also help to reduce cramping and discomfort associated with heavy bleeding. However, if your bleeding doesn't improve after a few days of using the cream, or if you experience severe symptoms, you should seek medical attention.
remedies.image_alt: Althaea officinalis herbal creams for over bleeding during periods

remedies.remedy_desc: Ginkgo biloba creams have been used to help with over bleeding during periods due to their ability to improve blood circulation and reduce inflammation. The creams contain flavonoids and terpenoids, which are compounds that help to relax blood vessels and improve blood flow to the uterus. This can help to reduce heavy bleeding and ease cramps.  To use Ginkgo biloba creams for over bleeding during periods, apply a small amount to the lower abdomen about an hour before bedtime. You can also take a warm bath or use a heating pad to help relax the muscles and improve blood flow. Some women also find it helpful to drink a cup of herbal tea, such as peppermint or chamomile, to calm the body and reduce cramps.  When using Ginkgo biloba creams, you can expect to see a reduction in heavy bleeding and a decrease in cramps. Some women may also experience a shorter period, although this can vary from person to person. If you have a history of heavy bleeding or clotting, it's essential to talk to your doctor before using Ginkgo biloba creams, as they may interact with other medications or worsen your condition.
remedies.image_alt: Ginkgo biloba herbal creams for over bleeding during periods

intro_desc: When a teenager starts her period, she might experience heavy bleeding that can be uncomfortable and disrupt her daily life. This can happen due to hormonal changes, genetics, or other health issues. Over bleeding can make her feel tired, weak, and in pain. It can also cause her to miss school, sports, or other activities she enjoys. She may feel anxious or stressed about the bleeding, which can make things worse. Some teen girls might also experience mood swings, irritability, or depression due to the discomfort and fear of not being able to control the bleeding. To make matters worse, the bleeding can also stain her clothes, bedding, and other belongings, making her feel self-conscious and embarrassed.  But there's some good news. Herbal creams can help. These creams are made from natural ingredients that are known to help reduce bleeding and ease discomfort. They work by reducing inflammation, regulating hormones, and helping the body to stop bleeding too much. They're usually applied directly to the skin, making them easy to use. Some creams also have other benefits, like soothing skin irritations or calming anxiety. They can be especially helpful for teen girls who are looking for a natural way to manage their periods, without relying on harsh chemicals or medications.
intro_image_alt: herbal creams for over bleeding during periods
